name: The Angle Matrix
description: Dynamically generate 5 distinct creative angles formatted for specific platforms.

inputs.label: Core Content Topic
inputs.placeholder: e.g., The psychology of SaaS pricing

promptTemplate:
You are a masterful content strategist. I want to talk about: {{topic}}. I am writing specifically for: {{platform}}.

Take this topic and generate exactly 5 distinct angles optimized perfectly for the chosen platform format. Return ONLY a valid JSON object. Do not include markdown formatting or trailing text. The JSON keys must be exactly: "The Controversial Take", "The Story Hook", "The Tactical Guide", "The Deep-Dive", and "The Myth-Buster". The values MUST be perfectly styled paragraphs fitting the platform vibe.
